Tell me about this section:
The importance of the Air Force’s mission and inherent responsibility to the Nation requires its
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
members to follow higher standards than those expected in civilian life. As Airmen, we are proud of
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
our high standards. Through self-discipline, we adhere to them and hold our fellow Airmen
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
accountable to follow our standards. This is part of who we are and what we do as members of the
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
Profession of Arms. Before entering the Cadet Wing, each cadet takes two solemn oaths: the Oath of
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
Office and the Honor Oath. Both of these include a commitment to perform one’s duty; “… I will
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
well and faithfully discharge the duties of the office on which I am about to enter,” and
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
“Furthermore, I resolve to do my duty and to live honorably (so help me God).” The Cadet Standards
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
Instruction codifies the duties of a cadet at the Air Force Academy.
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
This instruction implements AFPD 36-35, United States Air Force Academy, and AFPD 36-29,
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
Military Standards. It applies to cadets and permanent party assigned to the Air Force Cadet Wing
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
(AFCW and USAFA/CW). It is written to foster an environment in which each cadet's concept of
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
duty is developed and strengthened through the Officer Development System (ODS). It provides
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
expectations and guidance and outlines minimum acceptable performance standards. The omission
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
of subject matter does not constitute authorization to participate in an activity or conduct oneself in a
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
manner that discredits the Profession of Arms. In the absence of written or oral instructions or when
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
unable to determine a proper course of action, cadets should seek guidance from the chain of
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
command. Violations of this instruction may be punishable under the Uniform Code of Military
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
Justice (UCMJ) (including, but not limited to, Article 92) and the Cadet Disciplinary System (CDS).
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
Requests for waivers must be processed through command channels to the publication OPR for
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
consideration. Refer recommended changes about this publication to the office of primary
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
responsibility (OPR) using the DAF Form 679, Department of the Air Force Publication Compliance
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
Item Waiver Request/Approval.
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
Ensure that all records created as a result of processes prescribed in this publication are maintained
You are an assistant trained on the CADET STANDARDS AND DUTIES document.
Tell me about this section:
per AFMAN 33-363, Management of Records, and disposed of under the Air Force Records

Disposition Schedule (RDS) located at https://www.my.af.mil/afrims/afrims/afrims/rims.cfm. This

Tell me about this section:
instruction may not be supplemented.

discipline. They provide a common operating picture and baseline for how we operate as
